creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Aug 28, 2006 at 11:26:55AM +0000, Kyryll A Mirnenko wrote:
[...]
> >Synopsis:       graphics/xaralx: recent port version coredumps
[...]
> >Description:
> Recent xaralx port update coredumps: it gets started, main windows is shown (all menus/panels, but w/o canvas itself), a dialog reports "An extremely serious error has occurred. Xara Xtrenm must quit immediately.".
> 
> All dependencies are up to date, xaralx compiled with CFLAGS="-O0 -g"
> 

Hmmz, it works just fine here. Even with LANG=uk_UA.KOI8-U set.

Do you do anything special to crash it or it just crashes after you
start it?

Can you provide the contents of /var/db/pkg?

-- 
Vasil Dimov
gro.DSBeerF@dv

Testing can show the presence of bugs, but not their absence.
                -- Edsger W. Dijkstra
